name: Raspberry Chicken
recipeIngredient: Fresh or frozen raspberries for garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Place chicken breasts in a saucepan.
2. Combine equal parts of raspberry vinegar and chicken broth to cover the chicken breasts.
3. Poach for about 10 minutes, until the meat is opaque and cooked through. Remove from heat and keep covered.
4. Add enough sour cream to the mixture to lightly color it and flavor as desired with raspberry preserves or syrup.
5. To serve, drain the chicken breasts and place them on a serving tray.
6. Cover each piece with the sour cream mixture.
7. Garnish with raspberries, if desired.
Preparation time: 15 minutes
Cooking time: 10 minutes
